гҖҖгҖҖSimon Reeve travels to beautiful and troubled Burma, also called Myanmar, for a new two-part series (2x60').In August last year the world was left stunned when a brutal military operation drove hundreds of thousands of ethnic Rohingya Muslims from their homes. On his journey Simon discovers a divided country - where life is steadily improving for many, while others still live ...
